testcase.failure:
capsys = <_pytest.capture.CaptureFixture object at 0x1102f2e90> samples_dir = PosixPath('/Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/ful1e5@clickgen__ce70d07a__toml__tomlkit/samples') x11_tmp_dir = PosixPath('/private/var/folders/01/v7wkp0nx73l4tyy9v0_96rgh0000gn/T/pytest-of-nelsonmbigili/pytest-77/x11_tmp2') hotspot = (100, 105)
def test_clickgen_raises(capsys, samples_dir, x11_tmp_dir, hotspot): fp = samples_dir / "sample.toml" with open(fp, "rb") as f: with mock.patch( "argparse.ArgumentParser.parse_args", return_value=argparse.Namespace( files=[f], output=x11_tmp_dir, hotspot_x=hotspot[0], hotspot_y=hotspot[1], sizes=SIZES, delay=DELAY, platform="all", ), ): main() captured = capsys.readouterr() > assert "Error occurred while processing sample.toml" in captured.err E assert 'Error occurred while processing sample.toml' in 'Error occurred while processing migratelib:
Traceback (most recent call last):
 File "/Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/ful1e5@clickgen__ce70d07a__toml__tomlkit/src/clickgen/scripts/clickgen.py", line 93, in main
 cursor = open_blob(blobs, hotspot, args.sizes, args.delay)
